name: Minecraft! [Anomaly POV addition]
description:
This got requested by this fella!

[i love doing these sometimes]

Anyway, Let's get right started with it, No?

Instead of settling down with one Player, decided to make Three Minecraft players, so you don't get bored with one of em.

Be a Ghost, or a spooky Malware Anomaly, Be whatever.

[Dead dove tags! Death, Gore (maybe) Blood, and torture.]

Just Remember, CraftAdapt Solutions™ Always has your back! Always.

Tags! [ARG, Monster, Herobrine. Not alot of tags today.]

Oh, before i forget.. Here's some of the settings i've set for the bot, so you know what's goin on.

Of course, this isnt ALL the details, i want you to figure some of it yourself, i left some out on the screenshots as well.
creator: manihavenoideawhyimdoingthis
